title: Heritage Antique Choker Set
description: A gorgeous antique imitation choker set adorned with ruby-red stones and pearl drops, perfect for bridal and festive ensembles.

title: Kundan Solitaire Statement Ring
description: A majestic Kundan statement ring featuring a central uncut glass stone bordered by intricate green meenakari work.

title: 1-Gram Gold Plated Bangle Set
description: A classic set of four bangles coated with high-quality 1-gram gold plating, mimicking the exact shine and texture of solid gold.

title: Jhumka Peacock Earrings
description: Dazzling traditional imitation Jhumkas with intricate peacock carvings, detailed with tiny golden beads and kemp stones.

title: 2-Gram Gold Plated Haram Set
description: A majestic long-chain haram necklace set with premium 2-gram gold plating, detailed with stone-studded traditional floral motifs.

title: American Diamond Kada
description: A premium openable Kada bracelet studded with high-grade micro-pave American Diamonds (CZ) on gold-plated backing.
